statusLine: European fuel security is under strain with 16 of 27 countries holding critical fuel reserves below the mandatory 90-day minimum, despite recent strategic reserve releases.
fullAnalysis:
European fuel security faces significant pressure as 16 of 27 EU countries currently hold fuel reserves below the mandatory 90-day minimum across multiple fuel types. Romania presents the most concerning situation with petrol at just 43.6 days, diesel at 20.2 days, and jet fuel at 60 days. Poland and Spain also show critically low levels across all three fuel categories, with Poland's jet fuel reserves at only 21.3 days and Spain's at 37 days.

The crisis is most acute in Eastern European countries, with Romania, Poland, Lithuania, and Slovakia all showing multiple fuel types in critical status. Major economies are also affected - Germany holds just 52.7 days of petrol and 64.2 days of diesel, while France has 64.7 days of petrol reserves. Only 8 countries maintain safe levels across all fuel types, with Estonia and Slovenia showing the strongest positions at over 120 days for petrol and diesel.

Despite Brent crude falling 10.77% to $88.69 per barrel, fuel prices remain elevated with EU average petrol at €1.784/L and diesel at €2.021/L. The Netherlands faces the highest petrol prices at €2.316/L, while Malta enjoys the lowest at €1.34/L. These conditions reflect the ongoing impact of Middle East supply disruptions, even after strategic reserve releases have been deployed to stabilize markets.
keyPoints: 16 of 27 EU countries hold fuel reserves below the mandatory 90-day minimum across multiple fuel types
Romania shows the most critical situation with diesel reserves at just 20.2 days and petrol at 43.6 days
Major economies including Germany and France hold critically low petrol reserves at 52.7 and 64.7 days respectively
Jet fuel reserves are particularly strained with 19 of 27 countries below 90 days, including Poland at 21.3 days
Only 8 countries maintain safe fuel security across all three fuel types despite recent strategic reserve releases
